basic_details.job_title: Bank of Maharashtra Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bank of Maharashtra has released the official Specialist Officer Notification 2026 on 2026 at its official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the BoM Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 25–55 years (post-wise) with a qualification of Post Graduation Degree in Economics with specialization in Monetary/Financial Economics/Econometrics and a Doctorate Degree (desirable) can apply online from To be announced to 10-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Chief Economist: Max 55 years; Chief Manager: Max 40 years; Senior Manager: 25-38 years
age_limit.details: Chief Economist: Maximum age limit is 55 years. Chief Manager – Economist: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Senior Manager – Economist: Minimum age limit is 25 years and maximum age limit is 38 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation Degree in Economics with specialization in Monetary/ Financial Economics/ Econometrics. Doctorate Degree is desirable.
qualification.details: Chief Economist: Post Graduation Degree in Economics preferably with specialization in Monetary/ Financial Economics/ Econometrics from a recognized Indian/ Foreign University/Institute. Doctorate Degree in areas of Money/ Banking/ International Finance from a recognized university will be an added qualification. Mandatory Experience: Minimum 12 years of experience as Economist in a Commercial Bank/ Financial Institution or other reputed Corporate/ Rating Agencies/ Organizations; OR Minimum 12 years of Teaching Experience as Lecturer/ Professor in Economics in a reputed college/ University; OR Minimum 12 years of Combined experience as an Economist and in teaching. Desirable Experience: Candidates having experience in Economic Research Department/ Cell of Banks/ Financial Institutions OR Minimum 5 Years of experience in Senior Leadership position will be preferred. Chief Manager – Economist: Post Graduation Degree in Economics preferably with specialization in Monetary/ Financial Economics/ Econometrics from a recognized Indian/ Foreign University/ Institute. Doctorate Degree in areas of Money/ Banking/ International Finance from a recognized university will be an added qualification. Mandatory Experience: Minimum 5 years of experience as Economist in a Commercial Bank/ Financial Institution or other reputed Corporate/ Rating Agencies/ Organizations; OR Minimum 5 years of Teaching Experience as Lecturer/ Professor in Economics in a reputed college/ University; OR Minimum 5 years of Combined experience as an Economist and in teaching. Senior Manager – Economist: Post Graduation Degree in Economics preferably with specialization in Monetary/ Financial Economics/Econometrics from a recognized Indian/ Foreign University/Institute. Doctorate Degree in areas of Money/ Banking/ International Finance from a recognized university will be an added qualification. Mandatory Experience: Minimum 3 years of experience as Economist in a Commercial Bank/ Financial Institution or other reputed Corporate/ Rating Agencies/ Organizations; OR Minimum 3 years of Teaching Experience as Lecturer/ Professor in Economics in a reputed college/ University; OR Minimum 3 years of Combined experience as an Economist and in teaching.

salary_details.pay_scale: Chief Economist: Annual CTC negotiable; Chief Manager: Scale IV pay scale; Senior Manager: Scale III pay scale
salary_details.details: Chief Economist: Annual CTC, which is negotiable, will depend upon Experience & Current Emoluments of candidates in the present employment and place of posting. Remuneration shall not be a limiting factor for deserving candidates. Chief Manager – Economist: Scale of Pay: Scale IV (102300-2980/4 – 114220 – 3360/2 – 120940) Senior Manager – Economist: Scale of Pay: Scale III (85920-2680/5 – 99320 – 2980/2 - 105280)

selection_process: Examination (if required) Personal Interview / Discussion Group Discussions
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Bank of Maharashtra Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Bank of Maharashtra to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bank of Maharashtra Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Bank of Maharashtra Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Bank of Maharashtra Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bank of Maharashtra Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Bank of Maharashtra Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Chief Economist: Post Graduation Degree in Economics preferably with specialization in Monetary/ Financial Economics/ Econometrics from a recognized Indian/ Foreign University/Institute. Doctorate Degree in areas of Money/ Banking/ International Finance from a recognized university will be an added qualification. Mandatory Experience: Minimum 12 years of experience as Economist in a Commercial Bank/ Financial Institution or other reputed Corporate/ Rating Agencies/ Organizations; OR Minimum 12 years of Teaching Experience as Lecturer/ Professor in Economics in a reputed college/ University; OR Minimum 12 years of Combined experience as an Economist and in teaching. Desirable Experience: Candidates having experience in Economic Research Department/ Cell of Banks/ Financial Institutions OR Minimum 5 Years of experience in Senior Leadership position will be preferred. Chief Manager – Economist: Post Graduation Degree in Economics preferably with specialization in Monetary/ Financial Economics/ Econometrics from a recognized Indian/ Foreign University/ Institute. Doctorate Degree in areas of Money/ Banking/ International Finance from a recognized university will be an added qualification. Mandatory Experience: Minimum 5 years of experience as Economist in a Commercial Bank/ Financial Institution or other reputed Corporate/ Rating Agencies/ Organizations; OR Minimum 5 years of Teaching Experience as Lecturer/ Professor in Economics in a reputed college/ University; OR Minimum 5 years of Combined experience as an Economist and in teaching. Senior Manager – Economist: Post Graduation Degree in Economics preferably with specialization in Monetary/ Financial Economics/Econometrics from a recognized Indian/ Foreign University/Institute. Doctorate Degree in areas of Money/ Banking/ International Finance from a recognized university will be an added qualification. Mandatory Experience: Minimum 3 years of experience as Economist in a Commercial Bank/ Financial Institution or other reputed Corporate/ Rating Agencies/ Organizations; OR Minimum 3 years of Teaching Experience as Lecturer/ Professor in Economics in a reputed college/ University; OR Minimum 3 years of Combined experience as an Economist and in teaching.

Bank of Maharashtra Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Chief Economist: Maximum age limit is 55 years. Chief Manager – Economist: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Senior Manager – Economist: Minimum age limit is 25 years and maximum age limit is 38 years.

content_sections.heading: Bank of Maharashtra Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Chief Economist: Annual CTC, which is negotiable, will depend upon Experience & Current Emoluments of candidates in the present employment and place of posting. Remuneration shall not be a limiting factor for deserving candidates. Chief Manager – Economist: Scale of Pay: Scale IV (102300-2980/4 – 114220 – 3360/2 – 120940) Senior Manager – Economist: Scale of Pay: Scale III (85920-2680/5 – 99320 – 2980/2 - 105280)

content_sections.heading: Bank of Maharashtra Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Bank of Maharashtra Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Bank of Maharashtra to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bank of Maharashtra Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bank of Maharashtra Specialist Officer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Bank of Maharashtra Specialist Officer recruitment is 10th July 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Specialist Officer posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduation Degree in Economics with specialization in Monetary/ Financial Economics/ Econometrics. A Doctorate Degree in related fields is considered a desirable qualification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Specialist Officers in Bank of Maharashtra?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Specialist Officer posts in the Bank of Maharashtra recruitment drive, including Chief Economist, Chief Manager – Economist, and Senior Manager – Economist.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Manager – Economist post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Senior Manager – Economist position is between 25 years and 38 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for UR/EWS/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the UR/EWS/OBC categories is 1180. SC/ST/PwBD candidates have a reduced fee of 118.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these Specialist Officer roles?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve an examination (if required), followed by a Personal Interview/Discussion and Group Discussions to assess the candidates' suitability for the roles.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates with teaching experience apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a minimum of 3, 5, or 12 years of teaching experience as a Lecturer/Professor in Economics in a reputed college/University are eligible, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Chief Manager – Economist post?
faq.answer: The Chief Manager – Economist post falls under Scale IV pay scale, with a pay structure of 102300-2980/4 – 114220 – 3360/2 – 120940.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in the upper age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific information on age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Specialist Officer positions?
faq.answer: The job type for the Specialist Officer positions in this recruitment drive is Contractual for the Chief Economist role, while Chief Manager and Senior Manager roles are Permanent.
